title: aster lucidulus
intro: Aster lucidulus, also known as the woodland aster, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). It is native to North America and is known for its small, white or purple flowers. The medicinal properties of Aster lucidulus include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat a variety of health issues. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting immune function.
